sound_type: low growl (100-600 Hz) + sharp hiss (2,000-8,000 Hz). Defensive. E=5
ecosystem: Open grassland, sage-steppe, prairie. Eastern Washington. Fossorial specialist.

coordinates.description: American Badger in eastern WA grassland.

taxonomy_note.description: Second Mustelidae in stretch. Grassland representative. Ecological engineer.

song_metrics.key_property: AMERICAN BADGER. Growl + hiss. E=5. Tenacious digger. v1.49.360.

nodes.title: Tenacious Digger -- Fossorial Specialist
nodes.description: Massive claws, 10-50 burrows, digs faster than prey escapes. Ecological engineer.

nodes.title: Mustelidae Grassland Representative
nodes.description: Wolverine (wilderness) to badger (grassland). Same family, different habitats.

cross_references.relationship: MUSTELIDAE! Wolverine (wilderness, E=6) vs. badger (grassland, E=5).
ENERGY EQUILIBRIUM! Both E=5. Groove + soil. Balance.
